name: There is a useful piece of gear on the body of a W Corp. Cleanup Agent who was turned into a Bloodbag.
desc:
Looks like it's almost fully repaired.

But maybe risking an injury to a Sinner isn't worth the effort.

options.messageDesc: Lust & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.

result:
We don't have the luxury of wasting our time over something like this.

Leaving behind the gauntlet gunked up with gore, we forged on.

1.title: There is a useful piece of gear on a W Corp. Cleanup Agent who was turned into a Bloodbag.
successDesc: {0} manages to find the faulty circuit and successfully repairs it.
failureDesc:
"Almost there..."

Just as it was about to be over...

"...! Enemy attack, Executive Manager!"

We tarried too long, and the Bloodbags close in on us.
